channel.title: Deepu Soman — IT Leadership & Certifications
channel.description: Practical guides on IT infrastructure, project delivery, cyber security and the certifications that map them — from a 20-year IT leader.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot Lands in IT: What Changes for the People Who Run the Estate
item.description: Agent 365, Entra Agent IDs and autopilot agents — what Copilot becoming infrastructure means for the IT team.

item.title: Security Copilot and the AI-vs-AI Front Line
item.description: Microsoft Security Copilot, the Phishing Triage Agent, and what AI-vs-AI actually means in a real SOC.

item.title: Governing AI Before It Governs You: An IT Auditor's Playbook
item.description: The EU AI Act's August teeth, ISO 42001 as the auditable answer, and shadow AI — a practical governance playbook.

item.title: AI in Project Delivery: What the Copilot Hype Gets Right and Wrong
item.description: What AI in delivery genuinely takes off your plate, what it can't do, and the data-literacy gap that decides who benefits.

item.title: Delivering IT Across Three Countries: What Cross-Border Projects Taught Me
item.description: Telecom rollouts and a national metering programme across Kuwait, Malaysia and India — the parts of cross-border delivery no certification prepares you for.

item.title: Agile After PMP: Making Iterative Delivery Land in a Waterfall Organisation
item.description: The hybrid that actually delivers when the board wants a Gantt chart and the work wants iteration.

item.title: Building an Entertainment Centre's IT on Azure From a Blank Sheet
item.description: A rare greenfield build on Microsoft Azure — why I started with Entra ID and not servers.

item.title: The Microsoft 365 Security Baseline I Stand Up on Day One
item.description: Identity, conditional access, email authentication, endpoint posture and the Copilot data problem — the baseline before a tenant carries real work.

item.title: The Auditor in the Room: How CISA Changed the Way I Run My Own Estate
item.description: Evidence over assurances, and how the audit discipline holds up against the 2026 threat landscape.

item.title: Does CCNP Still Matter When Everything's Moving to SASE?
item.description: Standalone SD-WAN is fading and SASE is the default — is deep networking still worth learning? An honest answer.

item.title: The Certification Stack: What 17 Certifications Taught Me About Technology Leadership
item.description: From MCSA and CCNP to PMP, the ISACA trio and TOGAF — a personal map of two decades of certifications and what each layer actually taught.

item.title: PMP, PRINCE2 or Agile: Choosing Your Project Management Path
item.description: PMP, PRINCE2, PMI-ACP and CSM compared by someone who holds all four — with the decision tree the training providers won't lead with.

item.title: CISA, CISM, CRISC: Mapping the ISACA Triangle
item.description: Auditor, manager and risk lenses on one system — which ISACA certification to sit first and how the trio combines.

item.title: CEH & CHFI: Learning the Attacker's Mindset — Legally
item.description: What the EC-Council pair actually teaches, where they fit against hands-on certs, and why the forensic mindset is the underrated half.

item.title: Does TOGAF Still Matter? Enterprise Architecture in the AI Era
item.description: An honest defence and critique of TOGAF — and why AI transformation makes architecture governance more relevant, not less.

item.title: ITIL in a DevOps World: Service Management That Doesn't Slow You Down
item.description: ITIL and DevOps solve the same problem at different altitudes — what to keep, what to retire, and change control without the CAB.

item.title: Passkeys: Life After Passwords
item.description: Phishing-resistant sign-in is finally mainstream. How passkeys work under the hood, plus a pragmatic rollout plan for your product.
